problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: Combining mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
